meta.title: If the YF-23 was so good, why didn't it go into production?
meta.description:
Northrop's YF-23 has achieved near-legendary status among aviation buffs as one of the biggest what-ifs in fighter history, but was this fighter really as good as the memes say? And if it was... Why didn't the U.S. opt to buy it?

Let's break it down.
